items.title: Microsoft patches bug in video game Age of Empires II
items.summary: The vulnerability in the decades-old game could have allowed hackers to take over victims’ computers with a malicious game invite.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
